tasks.instruction: Add a live multifamily offering in Austin, TX with a projected cash yield of at least 5% and the lowest available minimum investment (up to $25,000) to your watchlist.

tasks.instruction: Compare at least two live office offerings in different cities with purchase prices under $40M, then start an investment in the one with the higher projected 5-year IRR and proceed to the investment review screen with a $25,000 amount.

tasks.instruction: Using the investment return calculator, model a $50,000 investment over 10 years at both 50% and 70% leverage, then save a scenario using whichever leverage shows a projected annualized return of at least 9%.

tasks.instruction: Create a new investor account and set a moderate risk tolerance, a 5–7 year investment horizon, and quarterly email updates about new deals.

tasks.instruction: Build a sample portfolio of three live offerings—one multifamily, one industrial, and one office—each in a different U.S. state, allocating $25,000 to each so the total planned investment is no more than $75,000.

tasks.instruction: Use the consultation or contact form to request a 30-minute call about 1031 exchange opportunities for a $500,000 portfolio, scheduled on a specific date within the next 7 days between 10:00 AM and 12:00 PM local time.

expected_values.name: Jordan Client
expected_values.message: I would like a 30-minute consultation focused on 1031 exchange opportunities in stable multifamily properties.
